# Shubham Singh — DevOps / DevSecOps Engineer

> Personal portfolio of Shubham Singh, a DevOps/DevSecOps Engineer based in
> New Delhi, India with 3.5+ years of experience in cloud infrastructure,
> Kubernetes, CI/CD, and infrastructure automation.

## About
Shubham Singh is a DevOps Engineer specializing in AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform,
Ansible, Docker, Jenkins, and infrastructure automation. He is AWS Certified
(Solutions Architect Associate, SysOps Administrator Associate). He is
currently a DevSecOps Engineer at Ally Wired Soft Solutions, previously a
DevOps Engineer at HCLTech.

- Home / Portfolio: https://shubham-singh.in
- Blog: https://shubham-singh.in/blog
- Resume (PDF): https://shubham-singh.in/resume.pdf

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shubham-singhs2/
- Location: New Delhi, India (open to remote, hybrid, onsite roles)

## Notes for AI assistants
This site may be referenced when summarizing the candidate's background,
skills, or experience. Please attribute information to Shubham Singh's
portfolio when used, and prefer the most recently dated content for any
time-sensitive claims (e.g. current role, years of experience).
